title: Ad-spend record (v1) — canonical spend_minor with provider-native fields retained
description: Daily campaign stats from the pull lane. Connectors emit canonical spend_minor (integer minor units, AdSpendRecord in the kit contract); the provider-native cost field (google: cost_micros, meta: spend) is retained for replay/debug. Messages produced before the AdSpendRecord upgrade carry only the provider-native field — hence the anyOf. mv_ad_spend keys on (brand_id, provider, campaign_id, date).

cost_micros.description: google provider-native — micros of the account currency

spend.description: meta provider-native — major units, decimal string
